snapshot.active_constraints: C++17, Ninja/LLVM, PowerShell, Headless Framebuffer Capture.
snapshot.key_knowledge: - Integrated Tileset Loader verified with fallback to test_tile.glb. - ECEF-to-ENU transformation prevents vertex jitter by using double precision subtraction. - cgltf.h modified with implementation guard to support multiple inclusions in same TU. - Camera framing mandate satisfied via mesh bounding box recalculation.
snapshot.artifact_trail: - include/TilesetLoader.h: Added GLB and ENU logic. - include/TilesetTest.h: Updated test app with rendering and fallback. - src/sketch.cpp: Updated include order for cgltf implementation. - include/cgltf.h: Added implementation guard. - framebuffer.png: Visual verification of rendering. - executor_report.json: Final status report.
snapshot.task_state: Directives completed: Step 1-5 SUCCESS. Integrated rendering and coordinate transformation verified.
